main.description: A single reaped yarrow stalk, saved to the drying loft (g.mino.mobi/sticks). The record stores only the immutable GENOME and the reap timestamp; the stick's live condition (drying, warp, checking, spoilage, grade) is recomputed deterministically from reapedAt + tends by the client, so the record is never re-written for curing — only for tends and culls.

seedStr.description: Parent specimen seed (the yarrow plant this stalk was reaped from).

pos.description: Position on the plant: 0 = main flowering stalk, 1..n = primary branches.

dryRate.description: Drying rate multiplier; faster dryers warp and check more.

warpTendency.description: Latent tendency to bow as it dries, 0..1.

colourPath.description: The colour it dries toward: straw | gold | red.

reapedAt.description: Reap time, epoch milliseconds. The cure clock starts here.

tends.description: Epoch-ms timestamps of each turn/tend. Turning the bundle mid-cure evens the drying and reduces warp + checking.
